channel.title: +MT on देवेषु विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +MT on देवेषु विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: Syncretism
item.description: The transformation of the name of this bodhisattva is an interesting case of syncretizing lateral H influence on the bauddha. It is interesting to see how it is reflected in chIna translations. The great earlier translator kumArajIva tends to render it as: Guān-shì-yīn (觀世音), which was supposed to capture: “the one who perceives the world’s laments.” This is congruent with avalokitasvara appearing in the manuscripts written in a register of Skt from 400-500s in Turkestan.
